
  // Type_async
  public class Type_async {
    var type_any : Type_any = e_any
    var resolved : Bool = false
    var result : Type_any = e_any
    var listasync : [Type_async] = []
  }
  // Generic_async_any
  public class Generic_async_any : Vx_Core.Generic_any {
    var backref : Type_async = e_async
    // p_shutdown
    override public func p_shutdown() {
      v_async_shutdown(self.backref)
    }
    // p_type_type
    override public func p_type_type() -> Vx_Core.Type_type {
      return t_async
    }
  }
  // Generic_async_type
  public class Generic_async_type : Vx_Core.Generic_type {
    // p_any_from_any
    override public func p_any_from_any(
      _ type_type : Vx_Core.Type_type,
      _ type_any : Vx_Core.Type_any
    ) -> Vx_Core.Type_any {
      let value : Type_async = v_async_any_from_any(type_type, type_any)
      let output : Vx_Core.Type_any = value.type_any
      return output
    }
    // p_copy
    override public func p_copy(
      _ copyany : Vx_Core.Type_any,
      _ type_anylist : Vx_Core.Type_anylist
    ) -> Vx_Core.Type_any {
      let copyval : Type_async = v_async_from_any(copyany)
      let value : Type_async = v_async_copy(copyval, type_anylist)
      let output : Vx_Core.Type_any = value.type_any
      return output
    }
    // p_new
    override public func p_new(
      _ type_type : Vx_Core.Type_type,
      _ type_anylist : Vx_Core.Type_anylist
    ) -> Vx_Core.Type_any {
      let value : Vx_Core.Type_async = f_async(type_anylist)
      let output : Vx_Core.Type_any = value.type_any
      return output
    }
  }
  // v_async_constructor
  public static func v_async_constructor(
  ) -> Type_async {
    Vx_Core.v_global_reserve()
    return Type_async()
  }
  // v_async_create
  public static func v_async_create(
  ) -> Type_async {
    var output : Type_async = v_async_constructor()
    v_async_startup(output)
    return output
  }
  // v_async_register
  public static func v_async_register(
  ) -> Vx_Core.Type_type {
    v_async_startup_type()
    v_async_startup_empty()
    return t_async
  }
  // v_async_shutdown - mutating
  public static func v_async_shutdown(
    _ value : Type_async
  ) {
    let type_any : Vx_Core.Type_any = value.type_any
    value.type_any = Vx_Core.e_any
    if let generic_any : Generic_async_any = type_any.generic_any {
      generic_any.backref = nil
    }
    value.resolved = false
    value.result = e_any
    let listany : [Vx_Core.Type_any] = Vx_Core.v_listany_from_listasync(
      value.listasync
    )
    value.listasync = []
    Vx_Core.v_release_listany(
      listany
    )
  }
  // v_async_startup - mutating
  public static func v_async_startup(
    _ value : Type_async
  ) {
    let generic_any = Generic_async_any()
    generic_any.backref = value
    value.type_any = Vx_Core.v_any_new_from_type_generic_any(
      t_async,
      generic_any
    )
  }
  // v_async_startup_empty
  public static func v_async_startup_empty() {
    v_async_startup(e_async)
    Vx_Core.v_startup_e(
      t_async,
      e_async.type_any
    )
  }
  // v_async_startup_type
  public static func v_async_startup_type() -> Vx_Core.Type_type {
    let type_type = t_async
    type_type.p_name = Vx_Core.v_string_from_stringn("vx/core/async")
    type_type.p_extends = Vx_Core.e_string
    let generic_type : Vx_Core.Generic_type = Generic_async_type()
    Vx_Core.v_startup_t(
      type_type,
      generic_type
    )
    return type_type
  }
  // v_any_from_async
  public static func v_any_from_async(
    _ value : Vx_Core.Type_async
  ) -> Vx_Core.Type_any {
    let output : Vx_Core.Type_any = value.type_any
    return output
  }
  // v_async_from_any
  public static func v_async_from_any(
    _ type_any : Vx_Core.Type_any
  ) -> Vx_Core.Type_async {
    var output : Vx_Core.Type_async = Vx_Core.e_async
    if let generic_any : Generic_async_any = type_any.generic_any {
      output = generic_any.backref
    }
    return output
  }
  // v_listany_from_listasync
  public static func v_listany_from_listasync(
    _ listasync : [Vx_Core.Type_async]
  ) -> [Vx_Core.Type_async] {
    var output : [Vx_Core.Type_any] = []
    for type_async : Vx_Core.Type_async in listany {
      listany.append(type_async.type_any)
    }
    return output
  }
  public static let t_async : Vx_Core.Type_type = Vx_Core.v_type_constructor()
  public static let e_async : Type_async = v_async_constructor()
